name: lab-fleet
description: Cross-platform local network management for school computer labs

scripts.build: npm run build -w @lab-fleet/shared && npm run build -w @lab-fleet/agent && npm run build -w @lab-fleet/desktop
scripts.package:linux: npm run build && npm run build:agent-binaries && npm run package:linux -w @lab-fleet/desktop
scripts.package:windows:app: npm run build && npm run build:agent-binaries && npm run package:windows:app -w @lab-fleet/desktop
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @lab-fleet/shared && concurrently -k -n agent,desktop -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @lab-fleet/agent" "npm run dev -w @lab-fleet/desktop"
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @lab-fleet/shared && npm run build -w @lab-fleet/agent && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
